_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin knockdown in human Schwann cells: clues to vestibular schwannoma tumorigenesis.

_contextSnippet: Optimal knockdown of merlin mRNA was observed at 200 pmol siRNA and above... merlin is sufficiently depleted by day 5 (i.e., 50%) and it is undetectable by day 8
resourceName: neurofibromin 2 ON-TARGETplus SMARTpool siRNA (Dharmacon, Lafayette, CO)
details: Optimal knockdown of merlin mRNA observed at 200 pmol siRNA and above; 50-70% protein reduction achieved with repeat transfection
